subject: Klink — two interlocking gear-shaped Pokemon creatures with faces
description: Two circular gear-shaped creatures with expressive faces interlock at their teeth, floating together as a pair. Each gear has a single large eye and a small mouth-like expression. One gear is slightly larger. The background is a lush green forest setting with purple and green tones, giving a slightly surreal contrast between the mechanical subjects and the organic environment. The overall image is compact and symmetrical around the two interlocked forms.
foreground: two interlocking gear-faced creatures, symmetrically posed
background: dense green forest, purple foliage hints
emotion: neutral, static expressions on gear faces
